1802950.name: CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It's a Night Magic +GP01Fb
1802950.description:
GP01Fb New Features

COM3D2’s 3rd major update!
This time, the existing edit system will be greatly expanded!
*R18 content is added when you've purchased [CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It's a Night Magic R18 patch] and applied it to your base unit.

New face items have been added to enable even more detailed editing.
By using the new face items, detailed editing functions will be added to allow you to pursue your ideal maid.
A new dance which you're looking forward to has been added, of course!
Edit items such as costumes, hairstyles, and accessories.

New backgrounds have been added, and much more in this update.

1. Fb face will upgrade editing!
By using Fb face, you can use additional edit items to create even more ideal maid!

2. 2 outfit sets, 2 hair sets, and 8 accessories have been added!
Create your ideal maid with the additional edit items!

3. NPC and Extra Maid scenarios have been added!
Scenarios for popular NPCs and extra maids have been added, as many as there are characters!

4. The new background "Sketchy bar" has been added!
A new background, "Sketchy bar," has been added to studio mode. Take lots of photos with your own maid!

5. Numerous room customize items have been added!

The costumes included in this DLC are compatible with both the High Poly Body and Normal Body.
You can use them in both COM3D2 and COM3D2.5.
